name: MP9 | 绿色格纹
descriptionEn: Manufactured in Switzerland, the cutting-edge MP9 SMG is an ergonomic polymer weapon favored by private security firms. It has been painted with a hydrographic in a taupe and blue-green plaid pattern. It's not a bagpipe, but it plays a song before every funeral
descriptionZh: 由瑞士制造，尖端的 MP9 微型冲锋枪是一把符合人类工效学的聚合物武器，深受私人保安公司青睐。 这把武器使用灰褐色和蓝绿色格子呢图案的花纹进行了涂装。 虽然它不是风笛，但它会在每场葬礼前演奏哀乐
